title: DungeonNodeContract
description: Runtime contract describing a single dungeon/map node (room, corridor, threshold) with invariants, entertainment metric targets, connectivity, and mechanic hooks.

id.description: Stable identifier for this dungeon node contract instance.

tier.description: Entitlement tier for this node definition.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase; dungeon-node contracts are Phase 2 (Bundles) artifacts.

regionRef.description: ID or registry reference of the regionContractCard this node belongs to.

tileRef.description: Optional ID or registry reference of the tile/seed this node maps to.

nodeId.description: Local node identifier within the region or dungeon graph.

name.description: Human-readable label for this node (safe for logs and tools).

role.description: Functional role of this node within the dungeon.

topology.description: Connectivity information and local traversal affordances.

connections.description: List of graph connections to other nodes.

targetNodeId.description: Node ID this node connects to.

notes.description: Short, non-horror design note about this connection.

tags.description: Optional structural tags for this node (e.g., chokepoint, vista).

liminalTags.description: Liminal structure markers used by LSG/HVF logic (doors, thresholds, stairwells).

invariantBands.description: Node-level invariant bands; must narrow parent region/tile envelopes.

metricTargets.description: Target entertainment metric bands for player experience in this node.

mechanicHooks.description: References to mechanic or event contracts that can act in this node.

role.description: Local role of this mechanic in this node (e.g., main_puzzle, ambient_hazard, chase_route).

activationPolicyRef.description: Optional ID of a policy that gates this mechanic by invariants/metrics.

telemetryHints.description: Optional hints used by telemetry tools for analysis.

criticalPath.description: True if this node is mandatory on the critical progression path.

intensityBeat.description: Intended intensity role of this node in pacing patterns.

deadLedgerRef.description: Optional Dead-Ledger attestation reference for this node contract.

band.description: Numeric band [min, max] within [0.0, 1.0] for invariants or metrics.
